findings.label: Native delegate binding
findings.gap: Native delegate binding depends on object lifetime and shutdown-safe unbinding.

findings.label: Engine lifecycle delegates
findings.gap: Engine lifecycle delegates need shutdown-safe C++/subsystem handling.

findings.label: Custom K2 async nodes
findings.gap: Custom K2 expansion behavior is native editor code, outside generic BP graph authoring.

findings.label: Gameplay AbilityTasks
findings.gap: AbilityTasks are GAS-specific async nodes with prediction and ability lifecycle constraints.

findings.label: Native delegate declarations
findings.gap: Native-only delegate topology usually needs C++ lifecycle handling or wrapper APIs.

findings.label: Delegate broadcasts
findings.gap: Broadcast points define callback semantics and ordering that need explicit graph topology.

findings.label: Explicit delegate unbinding
findings.gap: Conversion must preserve cleanup paths and object lifetime.

findings.label: BlueprintAssignable delegate properties
findings.gap: Existing MCP can declare/call/bind/assign/unbind/clear Blueprint Event Dispatchers, but generic or arbitrary delegate target authoring remains blocked.

UPROPERTY(BlueprintAssignable, Category = "Events", meta = (DisplayName = "On Leave Session Requested"))

findings.label: Dynamic delegate binding
findings.gap: Blueprint Event Dispatcher lifecycle nodes are supported; arbitrary AddDynamic conversion still needs target classification and lifecycle policy.

findings.label: Blueprint internal async factories
findings.gap: Internal async factories normally spawn specialized K2 async nodes with delegate outputs.

findings.label: Possible delegate handle removal or clear
findings.gap: Needs context to distinguish delegate handle cleanup from ordinary container mutation.

findings.label: Dynamic delegate declarations
findings.gap: Can inventory signatures and author Blueprint Event Dispatcher lifecycle nodes, but cannot generically author native or arbitrary delegate topologies yet.

identified_gaps: generic delegate lifecycle authoring for non-Event-Dispatcher targets
async proxy node authoring with callback exec pins
latent call validation exists only as opt-in function-call creation, not full continuation topology
UMG event binding exists, but it is widget-specific and not a generic delegate solution

recommendations.name: Native and arbitrary delegate lifecycle classification
recommendations.reason: Lyra includes delegate sites that require native retention, wrapper APIs, or explicit unbind policy even though Blueprint Event Dispatcher lifecycle nodes are now covered.
recommendations.implementation_hint: Add lifecycle-aware classification for non-BP-safe native delegates first, then consider generic delegate target authoring only where Blueprint graph semantics are equivalent.

recommendations.name: Async proxy node inventory and authoring
recommendations.reason: Lyra uses async action, cancellable async action, custom K2 async, and AbilityTask classes whose callback delegates and broadcasts need explicit exec-pin topology.
recommendations.implementation_hint: Start with read-only async proxy inventory. Authoring should model callback exec pins before any conversion attempt.

recommendations.name: Lifecycle delegate safety classifier
recommendations.reason: Native AddUObject/RemoveAll and engine lifecycle delegates are shutdown-sensitive and should remain native unless explicitly wrapped.
recommendations.implementation_hint: Classify World/Core/Slate/Editor delegate sites as native blockers in conversion planning.

recommendations.name: GAS AbilityTask-specific async policy
recommendations.reason: AbilityTasks are async Blueprint nodes tied to prediction, ability ownership, and activation lifecycle.
recommendations.implementation_hint: Handle as part of the GameplayAbility-specific classifier rather than generic async graph authoring.

safe_now: declare and call Blueprint Event Dispatchers with signature graphs
bind Blueprint Event Dispatchers to signature-compatible custom events
assign, unbind, and clear Blueprint Event Dispatcher lifecycle nodes
optionally create latent function call nodes when explicitly allowed
bind some UMG widget events through existing UMG-specific command
unsafe_without_reinforcement: generic delegate lifecycle authoring for non-Event-Dispatcher targets
native or arbitrary delegate target binding without lifecycle classification
async action proxy nodes with callback exec outputs
